card.name: Chorus of the First Hunters
card.text: Cycling {2u}, flashback {2r}

card.name: Denied by the Arcane
card.text: Counter target spell. Its controller may draw up to two cards at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep. You draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.

card.name: Monumental Henge
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Plains. {T}: Add {W}. {2}{W}{W}, {T}: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a historic card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Songwriter's Notebook
card.text: {t}: Reveal the top card of your library. If it's a creature card, create a 0/1 white Citizen creature token. If it's a land card, create a tapped Treasure token. If it's a noncreature, nonland card, create a tapped Junk token.

card.name: Cast for Rehearsal
card.text: Arcane spells you control have rebound. (Exile the spell as it resolves if you cast it from your hand. At the beginning of your next upkeep, you may cast that card from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Wrath of God
card.text: Destroy all creatures. They can't be regenerated.

card.name: Splicer's Skill
card.text: Create a 3/3 colorless Phyrexian Golem artifact creature token. Splice onto instant or sorcery {3}{W} (As you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Mira, Blade Dancer
card.text: Resonate - Put a +1/+1 counter on Mira. (Do so whenever an effect has you reveal one or more cards.) Mira has trample as long as you've revealed a card from your hand this turn. Partner—HUNTR/X

card.name: Flawless Maneuver
card.text: If you control a commander, you may cast this spell without paying its mana cost. Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Stormchaser Chimera
card.text: Flying {2}{U}{R}: Scry 1, then reveal the top card of your library. This creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is that card's mana value. (To scry 1, look at the top card of your library, then you may put that card on the bottom.)

card.name: Bobby, Supportive Manager
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1. Commander creatures you control have ward {3}. Partner—HUNTR/X

card.name: Tranquil Landscape
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic Forest, Plains, or Island card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Cycling {G}{W}{U} ({G}{W}{U}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Silundi Isle (Seoul Aquarium)
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}.

card.name: Shameful Distortion
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. When they do, this spell deals damage to them equal to the greatest mana value of cards revealed this way. Put that many -1/-1 counters on target creature they control.

card.name: Zoey, Colors Swirling
card.text: Flash Play with the top card of your library revealed. (Whenever an unrevealed card is on top of your library, reveal it.) {3}{u}: Draw a card. Partner—HUNTR/X

card.name: Soulbound Reinforcements
card.text: Choose one - • Reveal your hand. Create a 0/1 white Citizen creature token for each card you revealed this turn. • Target opponent reveals their hand. Create a 1/1 red Demon creature token. Put a +1/+1 counter on it for each card that opponent revealed this turn.

card.name: Rumi, Broken Glass
card.text: {2}{wb}: Target player reveals their hand. Whenever a player reveals a white card, Rumi gains hexproof until end of turn. The same is true for blue and flying, black and lifelink, red and first strike, and green and indestructible.

card.name: Open the Armory Alt
card.text: Search your library for an Aura or Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Crumbling Necropolis
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}, {B}, or {R}.

card.name: Treasure
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Meet the Light
card.text: Each player reveals their hand, all face-down permanents they control, and all face-down cards they own in exile. (Do so all at once.) Scry 2. Splice onto instant or sorcery {u} (As you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Echoing Banishment
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. Reverberate - If you cast this spell and you've revealed a card this turn, copy this spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. Splice onto instant or sorcery {2}{u}{u} (As you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Soporific Springs
card.text: As this land enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}.

card.name: Ruby Medallion
card.text: Red spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Command Tower Alt
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

card.name: Seaside Citadel
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}, {W}, or {U}.

card.name: Rooftop Rendezvous
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, target opponent reveals a card at random from their hand. {t}: Add {u} or {r}.

card.name: Junk
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

card.name: Stormcarved Coast
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Ponder
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library, then put them back in any order. You may shuffle. Draw a card.

card.name: Hidden Lair
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {U} or {B}. Activate only if this land entered this turn or if you control a basic land.

card.name: Fierce Guardianship
card.text: If you control a commander, you may cast this spell without paying its mana cost. Counter target noncreature spell.

card.name: Spiritual Visit
card.text: Create a 1/1 colorless Spirit creature token. Splice onto Arcane {W} (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Resounding Negation
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. Reverberate — If you or that spell's controller revealed a card this turn, counter that spell instead.

card.name: Beast Within
card.text: Destroy target permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Beast creature token.

card.name: Arcane Infusion
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal an instant or sorcery card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Flashback {3}{U}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: HUNTR/X, Ft. the Fans
card.text: First strike, vigilance, reach Resonate - Create a 0/1 white Citizen creature token. (Do so whenever an effect has you reveal one or more cards.) HUNTR/X gets +1/+0 for each Citizen you control.

card.name: Grand Crescendo
card.text: Create X 1/1 green and white Citizen creature tokens. Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Resonating Strike
card.text: Reverberate - Exile target attacking or blocking creature. If you revealed one or more cards this turn, exile up to one other target attacking or blocking creature with power 4 or less.

card.name: Support Crew
card.text: When this creature enters, create two 0/1 white Citizen creature tokens. Creatures you control have exalted. (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each instance of exalted among permanents you control.) Miracle {1}{w} (You may reveal this card as you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn. If you do, you may cast it for its miracle cost.)

card.name: Rakdos Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target player's graveyard. • Destroy target artifact. • Each creature deals 1 damage to its controller.

card.name: Silver Shroud Costume
card.text: Flash When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. That creature gains shroud until end of turn. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities.) Equipped creature can't be blocked. Equip {3}

card.name: Instant Ramen
card.text: Flash When this artifact enters, draw a card. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Glacial Fortress
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Plains or an Island. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Harmonic Restoration
card.text: Resonate - Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. If you revealed one or more cards this turn, return it to the battlefield instead. Splice onto instant or sorcery {4}{w} (As you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Clifftop Retreat
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Mountain or a Plains. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Temple of the False God
card.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}. Activate only if you control five or more lands.

card.name: Scheduled Thoroughfare
card.text: As this land enters, you may reveal a card at random from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {t}: Add {g} or {u}.

card.name: Celine, Trainer of Hunters Alt
card.text: Double strike Arcane spells and Performer spells you cast cost {r} less to cast. (This can reduce generic costs.) Other Warriors you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Weathered Wayfarer
card.text: {W}, {T}: Search your library for a land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Activate only if an opponent controls more lands than you.

card.name: Sidequest: Catch a Fish
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, look at the top card of your library. If it's an artifact or creature card, you may reveal it and put it into your hand. If you put a card into your hand this way, create a Food token and transform this enchantment.

card.name: Compelled Torment
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. When they do, this spell deals damage to them or to target creature they control equal to the greatest mana value of cards revealed this way.

card.name: Zoey, HUNTR_X Maknae Promo
card.text: Resonate - Untap Zoey. (Do so whenever an effect has you reveal one or more cards) {t}: Add one mana of any color. This mana can't be spent to cast a creature spell. Partner—HUNTR/X

card.name: Resonating Scream
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. Cycling {1}{u}{b}{r} ({1}{u}{b}{r}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) When you cycle this card, each opponent discards two cards at random then reveals their hand.

card.name: HUNTR/X, Feast of the Fans
card.text: Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, create a 0/1 white Human Citizen creature token. {b}, Sacrifice a creature: You gain 2 life. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It's a Demon with lifelink as long as it has a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Silundi Vision (Soul Vision)
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may reveal an instant or sorcery card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Murmurs from Beyond
card.text: Reveal the top three cards of your library. An opponent chooses one of them. Put that card into your graveyard and the rest into your hand.

card.name: Imperial Recruiter
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a creature card with power 2 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Into the Fray
card.text: Target creature attacks this turn if able. Splice onto Arcane {R} (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Temple of Epiphany
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.) {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Overblaze
card.text: Each time target permanent would deal damage to a permanent or player this turn, it deals double that damage to that permanent or player instead. Splice onto Arcane {2}{R}{R} (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Idol's Stage
card.text: When this land enters, you may reveal a card from your hand. {t}: Add {c}. {t}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only if you've revealed a card this turn.

card.name: Glacial Ray
card.text: This spell deals 2 damage to any target. Splice onto Arcane {1}{R} (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Resonant Memorial
card.text: As this land enters, you may reveal a card at random from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {t}: Add {r} or {g}.

card.name: Open the Armory
card.text: Search your library for an Aura or Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Banishing Strike
card.text: Reverberate - Choose one. If you revealed a card this turn, instead choose any number. • Exile target artifact. • Exile target creature. • Exile target enchantment. Miracle {2}{w} (You may reveal this card as you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn. If you do, you may cast it for its miracle cost.)

card.name: Lifted by Clouds
card.text: Target creature gains flying until end of turn. Splice onto Arcane {1}{U} (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Celine, Trainer of Hunters
card.text: Double strike Arcane spells and Performer spells you cast cost {r} less to cast. (This can reduce generic costs.) Other Warriors you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Gwi-ma's Guiltsapper
card.text: Undying (When this creature dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.) Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, other creatures you control gain undying until end of turn.

card.name: Vibrant Cityscape
card.text: {t}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Baby Saja, Ungodly Lyricist
card.text: Rhyme Scheme - Each instant and sorcery card in your hand has "Splice onto instant or sorcery that shares a color with this card." The splice cost is equal to its mana cost. (As you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may reveal any number of cards from your hand that share a color with it and pay their costs. If you do, add that card's effects to that spell.) Partner—Saja

card.name: Friendly Neighborhood
card.text: Enchant land When this Aura enters, create three 1/1 green and white Human Citizen creature tokens. Enchanted land has "{1}, {T}: Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery."

card.name: Rumi, Cherished Melody
card.text: Resonate - You gain 3 life. If this isn't the first time this ability has resolved this turn, Rumi becomes prepared. (Resonate abilities trigger whenever an effect has you reveal one or more cards.) Partner—HUNTR/X --- Prepare Spell — Found Harmony {2}{g} Sorcery - Arcane Draw a card for each creature you control. (While Rumi is prepared, you may cast a copy of this spell. Doing so unprepares her.)

card.name: Port Town
card.text: As this land enters, you may reveal a Plains or Island card from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Recruitment Officer
card.text: {3}{W}: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card with mana value 3 or less from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Legion Angel
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may reveal a card you own named Legion Angel from outside the game and put it into your hand.

card.name: Deflecting Swat
card.text: If you control a commander, you may cast this spell without paying its mana cost. You may choose new targets for target spell or ability.

card.name: Blessed Breath
card.text: Target creature you control gains protection from the color of your choice until end of turn. Splice onto Arcane {W} (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Gwi-ma's Soulripper
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, you may have this creature fight target creature they control.

card.name: Truth and Power
card.text: Play with your hand revealed. Cards you own have flash. Creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Fact or Fiction
card.text: Reveal the top five cards of your library. An opponent separates those cards into two piles. Put one pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

card.name: The Honmoon Reawakened
card.text: Ward {2} Instant and sorcery spells you cast are Arcane. Whenever you cast a spell, copy it for each spell spliced onto it. You may choose new targets for the copy. Performers you control have flying.

card.name: Command Beacon
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Put your commander into your hand from the command zone.

card.name: Cooking Campsite
card.text: {T}: Add {W}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Holistic Clinic
card.text: As this land enters, you may reveal a card at random from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {t}: Add {g} or {w}.

card.name: Jinu, Ashamed Idol
card.text: Menace, haste Whenever an opponent reveals one or more cards, you gain that much life. Whenever Jinu attacks, defending player reveals their hand. Choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card unless they pay 4 life and have you draw a card. Partner—Saja

card.name: Guiding Voice
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Learn. (You may reveal a Lesson card you own from outside the game and put it into your hand, or may discard a card to draw a card.)

card.name: Rumi's Sain-geom
card.text: Equipped creature gets +3/+3 and has hexproof. If you've revealed a white card this turn, equipped creature has lifelink. If you've revealed a blue card this turn, equipped creature has flying. Equip - {2}, {t}, Reveal your hand

card.name: Shaper of the Pride
card.text: Shadow (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) Once each turn when a player reveals one or more nonland cards from their hand, you may exile any number of them. If you do, that player draws that many cards.

card.name: Seething Song
card.text: Add {R}{R}{R}{R}{R}.

card.name: Skyline View
card.text: This land enters tapped. When ~ enters, sacrifice it unless you reveal your hand. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Cabal Therapist
card.text: Menace At the beginning of your first main phase, you may sacrifice a creature. When you do, choose a nonland card name, then target player reveals their hand and discards all cards with that name.

card.name: Martyr of Sands
card.text: {1}, Reveal X white cards from your hand, Sacrifice this creature: You gain three times X life.

card.name: Pearl Medallion
card.text: White spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Swords to Plowshares
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.

card.name: Romance, Alluring Star
card.text: Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card or cards each turn, you may gain control of target creature they control with mana value X or less, where X is the highest mana value among those cards, until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Partner—Saja

card.name: Rumi, Leader of Idols
card.text: When Rumi enters, search your library for a card with "Partner—HUNTR/X," reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}{wu}, {t}: You may reveal a card from your hand. If you do, prevent all damage a source of your choice would deal this turn. Otherwise, draw a card. Partner—HUNTR/X

prop.type: Legendary Creature - Human Demon Warrior Performer

card.name: Banishing Light
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Legion Angel Alt
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may reveal a card you own named Legion Angel from outside the game and put it into your hand.

card.name: Spirit en-Dal
card.text: Shadow (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) Forecast — {1}{W}, Reveal this creature from your hand: Target creature gains shadow until end of turn. (Activate only during your upkeep and only once each turn.)

card.name: Gwi-ma's Plaguespitter
card.text: Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.) Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, other creatures you control gain deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Brutal Deceivers
card.text: {1}: Look at the top card of target player's library. {r}: Target player reveals the top card of their library. If it's a land card, this creature gets +1/+1 and gains first strike and menace until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Inspirational Studio
card.text: As this land enters, you may reveal a card at random from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {t}: Add {u} or {r}.

card.name: Run Away Together
card.text: Choose two target creatures controlled by different players. Return those creatures to their owners' hands.

card.name: Arcane Signet Alt
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

card.name: Turbulent Steppe
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) This land enters tapped unless your opponents control eight or more lands.

card.name: Through the Breach
card.text: You may put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield. That creature gains haste. Sacrifice that creature at the beginning of the next end step. Splice onto Arcane {2}{r}{r}

card.name: Mira, Blade Dancer Promo
card.text: Resonate - Put a +1/+1 counter on Mira. (Do so whenever an effect has you reveal one or more cards.) Mira has trample as long as you've revealed a card from your hand this turn. Partner—HUNTR/X

card.name: Temple of Plenty
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.) {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Calibrated Blast
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. Put the revealed cards on the bottom of your library in a random order. When you reveal a nonland card this way, Calibrated Blast deals damage equal to that card's mana value to any target. (Each revealed card triggers resonate abilities seperately.) Flashback {3}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Sink into Stupor
card.text: Return target spell or nonland permanent an opponent controls to its owner's hand.

card.name: Horde Ambusher
card.text: Whenever this creature blocks, it deals 1 damage to you. Morph—Reveal a red card in your hand. (You may cast this card face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. Turn it face up any time for its morph cost.) When this creature is turned face up, target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Commander's Plate
Seething Landscape
card.text: Zengin must have deleted the save file for this one. Go yell at him, but not too loud; it was definitely an accident.

card.name: Gwi-ma's Heartflayer
card.text: Ward—Pay 2 life Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, creatures they control get -2/-0 and creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Swiftfoot Boots
card.text: Equipped creature has hexproof and haste. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control. It can attack and {T} no matter when it came under your control.) Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Derpy and Sussie, Loyal Messengers
card.text: Whenever you reveal your first card each turn, you may draw a card. If you do, target opponent draws a card then discards a card. Derpy and Sussie can't be blocked.

card.name: Romantic Getaway
card.text: As this land enters, you may reveal a card at random from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {t}: Add {r} or {w}.

card.name: Huntrix's Rising Harmony
Strange Inversion
card.text: Switch target creature's power and toughness until end of turn. Splice onto Arcane {1}{R} (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Myriad Landscape
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for up to two basic land cards that share a land type, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Farewell
card.text: Choose one or more — • Exile all artifacts. • Exile all creatures. • Exile all enchantments. • Exile all graveyards.

card.name: Fortified Village
card.text: As this land enters, you may reveal a Forest or Plains card from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Enlightened Tutor
card.text: Search your library for an artifact or enchantment card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.

card.name: Eerie Procession
card.text: Search your library for an Arcane card, reveal that card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Memories Returning
card.text: Reveal the top five cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand. Then choose an opponent. They put one on the bottom of your library. Then you put one into your hand. Then they put one on the bottom of your library. Put the other into your hand. Flashback {7}{U}{U}

card.name: Gwi-ma's Woeseeker
card.text: Vigilance Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Brainstorm
card.text: Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.

card.name: Djinn of Wishes
card.text: Flying This creature enters with three wish counters on it. {2}{u}{u}, Remove a wish counter from this creature: Reveal the top card of your library. You may play that card without paying its mana cost. If you don't, exile it.

card.name: Food
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Furycalm Snarl
card.text: As this land enters, you may reveal a Mountain or Plains card from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Dragon's Eye Savants
card.text: Morph—Reveal a blue card in your hand. (You may cast this card face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. Turn it face up any time for its morph cost.) When this creature is turned face up, look at target opponent's hand.

card.name: Reforge the Soul
card.text: Each player discards their hand, then draws seven cards. Miracle {1}{R} (You may reveal this card as you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn. If you do, you may cast it for its miracle cost.)

card.name: Stock Up
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Temple of Mystery
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.) {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Veil of Secrecy
card.text: Target creature gains shroud until end of turn and can't be blocked this turn. (A creature with shroud can't be the target of spells or abilities.) Splice onto Arcane—Return a blue creature you control to its owner's hand. (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Powerbalance
card.text: Whenever an opponent casts a spell, you may reveal the top card of your library. If you do, you may cast that card without paying its mana cost if the two spells have the same mana value.

card.name: Rakshasa's Secret
card.text: Target opponent discards two cards. You mill two cards.

card.name: Counterbalance
card.text: Whenever an opponent casts a spell, you may reveal the top card of your library. If you do, counter that spell if it has the same mana value as the revealed card.

card.name: Sunpetal Grove
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Forest or a Plains. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Gwi-ma's Shamegorger
card.text: Trample, haste Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent and each non-Demon creature. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, they reveal their hand.

card.name: Zoey, HUNTR/X Maknae
card.text: Resonate - Untap Zoey. (Do so whenever an effect has you reveal one or more cards) {t}: Add one mana of any color. This mana can't be spent to cast a creature spell. Partner—HUNTR/X

card.name: HUNTR_X, Ft. the Fans Promo
card.text: First strike, vigilance, reach Resonate - Create a 0/1 white Citizen creature token. (Do so whenever an effect has you reveal one or more cards.) HUNTR/X gets +1/+0 for each Citizen you control.

card.name: Sphinx of Uthuun (Tiger of the Hojak-do)
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, reveal the top five cards of your library. An opponent separates those cards into two piles. Put one pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

card.name: Path of Ancestry
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1.

card.name: Dive in the Fire
card.text: Resonate - If you revealed one or more cards this turn, creatures you don't control lose indestructible until end of turn This spell deals 3 damage to any target. Splice onto instant or sorcery {2}{r} (As you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Counterspell
card.text: Counter target spell.

card.name: Thoughtcutter Agent
card.text: {U}{B}, {T}: Target player loses 1 life and reveals their hand.

card.name: Sapphire Medallion
card.text: Blue spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Rogue's Passage
card.text: {t}: Add {c}. {4}, {t}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Prodder of Sin
card.text: Menace At the beginning of your upkeep, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. Draw it and put the other cards on the bottom of your library in any order. Then any opponent may have you discard the drawn card. If a player does, this creature deals damage to them equal to that card's mana value.

card.name: Blasphemous Act
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield. Blasphemous Act deals 13 damage to each creature.

card.name: Harmonize
card.text: Draw three cards.

card.name: Mira, the Broken Blade
card.text: Menace Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Mira. Partner—Lost to shame

card.name: Resonant Arcanists
card.text: {t}: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast an Arcane spell or to pay a splice cost.

card.name: Command Tower
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

card.name: Unassuming Crowd
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, until end of turn, creatures you control gain hexproof and become Citizens in addition to their other types.

card.name: In Garruk's Wake (Kpop DEMON slayers)
card.text: Destroy all creatures you don't control and all planeswalkers you don't control.

card.name: Hundred-Talon Strike
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. Splice onto Arcane—Tap an untapped white creature you control. (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Temple of Malice
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Food alt Sexy
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Psychic Puppetry
card.text: You may tap or untap target permanent. Splice onto Arcane {U} (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Ascendant Finale
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain indestructible until end of turn. Reverberate - If you revealed one or more cards this turn, those creatures also gain flying until end of turn. Miracle {w} (You may reveal this card as you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn. If you do, you may cast it for its miracle cost.)

card.name: Wash Away
card.text: Cleave {1}{U}{U} (You may cast this spell for its cleave cost. If you do, remove the words in square brackets.) Counter target spell [that wasn't cast from its owner's hand].

card.name: Gwi-ma's Distortion
card.text: Zengin must have deleted the save file for this one. Go yell at him, but not too loud; it was definitely an accident.

card.name: Echoing Harmony
card.text: Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. You may choose new targets for the copies.) Splice onto instant or sorcery {2}{u}{r} (As you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Thunderous Wrath
card.text: Thunderous Wrath deals 5 damage to any target. Miracle {R} (You may reveal this card as you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn. If you do, you may cast it for its miracle cost.)

card.name: Commander's Plate Alt Huntrix
Bonfire of the Damned
card.text: ~ deals X damage to target player or planeswalker and each creature that player or that planeswalker's controller controls. Miracle {X}{R} (You may reveal this card as you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn. If you do, you may cast it for its miracle cost.)

card.name: Candid Inspiration
card.text: Draw two cards. Reverberate - If you've revealed a card this turn, instead draw three cards. Miracle {u} (You may reveal this card as you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn. If you do, you may cast it for its miracle cost.)

card.name: Mira's Gok-do
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+2 and has first strike. If you've revealed a red card this turn, equipped creature has haste. If you've revealed a white card this turn, equipped creature has indestructible. Equip - {1}, {t}, Reveal your hand

card.name: Run Away Together Alt
card.text: Choose two target creatures controlled by different players. Return those creatures to their owners' hands.

card.name: Prospective Hunter
card.text: Training (Whenever this creature attacks with another creature with greater power, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) Resonate - You may move a counter from target creature you control onto another target creature you control. (Do so whenever an effect has you reveal one or more cards.)

card.name: Sol Ring
card.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.

card.name: Watcher of the Roost
card.text: Flying Morph—Reveal a white card in your hand. (You may cast this card face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. Turn it face up any time for its morph cost.) When this creature is turned face up, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Mira, Napalm Era
card.text: Menace, trample {2}{r}: Reveal the top card of your library. You may exile it. Resonate - Mira gets +2/+2 until end of turn. (Do so whenever an effect has you reveal one or more cards.) Partner—HUNTR/X

card.name: Distant Melody
card.text: Choose a creature type. Draw a card for each permanent you control of that type.

card.name: Gwi-ma's Mindraker
card.text: Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.) Whenever a player casts a spell, if they've revealed a card this turn, you may counter that spell unless they pay {1}. When they pay, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Zoey's Shin-kal
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has prowess. If you've revealed a blue card this turn, equipped creature has vigilance. If you've revealed a red card this turn, equipped creature has reach. Equip - {1}, {t}, Reveal your hand

Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may return target creature that player controls to its owner's hand.

card.text: Storm Splice onto instant or sorcery {2}{u}{r}

card.name: Underground River
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {U} or {B}. This land deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Piercing Rays
card.text: Exile target tapped creature. Forecast — {2}{W}, Reveal this card from your hand: Tap target untapped creature. (Activate this ability only during your upkeep and only once each turn.)

card.name: Entrancing Melody
card.text: Gain control of target creature with mana value X.

card.name: Restless Spire
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}. {U}{R}: Until end of turn, this land becomes a 2/1 blue and red Elemental creature with "During your turn, this creature has first strike." It's still a land. Whenever this land attacks, scry 1.

card.name: Anguish
card.text: Target player reveals a card at random from their hand. When they do, this spell deals damage to target creature they control equal to that card's mana value. If no damage is dealt this way, return this spell to its owner's hand. Flashback {2}{r}

card.name: Unbreakable Formation
card.text: Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. Addendum — If you cast this spell during your main phase, put a +1/+1 counter on each of those creatures and they gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Commander's Sphere
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Sunken Hollow
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Zoey, Infernal Thrall
card.text: Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, untap Zoey. {1}, {t}: Create a Treasure token. {u}{b}, Pay 1 life, {t}: Draw a card. Partner—Lost to shame

card.name: Counterspell Alt 주문 무효화
card.text: 주문을 목표로 정한다. 그 주문을 무효화한다.

card.name: Path of Ancestry Alt
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1.

card.name: Path to Exile
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Walker of Secret Ways
card.text: Ninjutsu {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Reveal this card from your hand, Return an unblocked attacker you control to hand: Put this card onto the battlefield tapped and attacking.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, look at that player's hand. {1}{U}: Return target Ninja you control to its owner's hand. Activate only during your turn.

card.name: Hunter's Stance
card.text: If you've revealed a red card this turn, destroy up to one target artifact. If you've revealed a white card this turn, put two +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature. If you've revealed a blue card this turn, scry 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Reliquary Tower
card.text: You have no maximum hand size. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Observed Alleyway
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, target opponent reveals a card at random from their hand. {t}: Add {u} or {b}.

card.name: Abby, Icon of Strength
card.text: Trample Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card or cards each turn, you may pay X life, where X is the highest mana value among those cards. If you do, Abby gets +X/+X until end of turn. Partner—Saja (You can have two commanders if both have this.)

card.name: Gwi-ma, Otherworld King
card.text: Other Demons you control have lifelink. Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, exile the top card of their library with a shame counter on it. You may play it for as long as it remains exiled by paying life in addition to its other costs, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast it.

card.name: Rumi, Queen of Nightmares
card.text: When Rumi enters, search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle. Each opponent reveals their hand. {2}{br}, {t}: Rumi deals damage equal to the number of Demons you control to target opponent that revealed a card this turn. Partner—Lost to Shame

card.name: Disaster Radius
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, reveal a creature card from your hand. Disaster Radius deals X damage to each creature your opponents control, where X is the revealed card's mana value.

card.name: Jet Medallion
card.text: Black spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Mother of Runes
card.text: {T}: Target creature you control gains protection from the color of your choice until end of turn.

card.name: Spellseeker
card.text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for an instant or sorcery card with mana value 2 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Lay Bare
card.text: Counter target spell. Look at its controller's hand.

card.name: Temple of Deceit
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.) {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Gwi-ma's Scornlurker
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Eavesdropping Overview
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, target opponent reveals a card at random from their hand. {t}: Add {b} or {r}.

card.name: Deadly Rollick
card.text: If you control a commander, you may cast this spell without paying its mana cost. Exile target creature.

card.name: Vineglimmer Snarl
card.text: As this land enters, you may reveal a Forest or Island card from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Canopy Vista
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Basilisk Collar
card.text: Equipped creature has deathtouch and lifelink. (Any amount of damage it deals to a creature is enough to destroy it. Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.) Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Gwi-ma's Griefchaser
card.text: Trample, haste Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card each turn, other creatures you control gain trample and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Collaborative Workshop
card.text: As this land enters, you may reveal a card at random from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {t}: Add {w} or {u}.

card.name: Mystery, Silencer of Secrets
card.text: Shame - Whenever an opponent reveals their first card or cards each turn, choose a nonland card from among them and exile it. You and that player may cast that card for as long as it remains exiled. You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast it. Partner—Saja

card.name: Twiddle
card.text: You may tap or untap target artifact, creature, or land.

card.name: Sulfur Falls
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control an Island or a Mountain. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Glamoured Disguises
card.text: Until your next turn, any number of target creatures are Citizens with base power and toughness 1/1. Reverberate - If you've revealed a card this turn, any number of those creatures also lose all abilities until your next turn.

card.name: Crosis, the Purger (Gwi-ma, Condemning Kaiju)
card.text: Zengin must have deleted the save file for this one. Go yell at him, but not too loud; it was definitely an accident.

card.name: Swarm of Secrets
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create X plus one 1/1 red Demon creature tokens. Sacrifice a creature: Target player reveals the top card of their library. You may put it on the bottom. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Night's Whisper
card.text: You draw two cards and you lose 2 life.

card.name: Terramorphic Expanse
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Environmental Sciences
card.text: (If you start the game with this card outside your deck, a card with 'Learn' can find it.) Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Everdream
card.text: Draw a card. Splice onto instant or sorcery {2}{U} (As you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Cruel Ultimatum

card.name: Rumi, Leader of Idols Promo
card.text: When Rumi enters, search your library for a card with "Partner—HUNTR/X," reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}{wu}, {t}: You may reveal a card from your hand. If you do, prevent all damage a source of your choice would deal this turn. Otherwise, draw a card. Partner—HUNTR/X

prop.type: Legendary Creature - Human Demon Warrior Performer

card.name: Frostboil Snarl
card.text: As this land enters, you may reveal an Island or Mountain card from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Chaos Warp
card.text: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library, then reveals the top card of their library. If it's a permanent card, they put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Bloodthirsty Conqueror
card.text: Flying, deathtouch Whenever an opponent loses life, you gain that much life. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: Silence
card.text: Your opponents can't cast spells this turn.

card.name: Hullbreaker Horror
card.text: Flash This spell can't be countered. Whenever you cast a spell, choose up to one — • Return target spell you don't control to its owner's hand. • Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
